creator: empty.japan
caption:
You have to try this type of sushi.
One of the most famous sushi restaurants of Osaka called @sushiakazu specializes in using a very unique 10 years aged red vinegar (寿司赤酢 SushiAkazu translates as Red Vinegar Sushi) to cook the most delicious sushi that I’ve ever had.
This time I had an omakase (20 dishes course) and guys… it literally blew my mind!
If you will be lucky enough and they will have an open spot for reservations, do yourself a favor and give it a try! But be careful, it will be so good that you will have one more reason to come back to Japan once more 💘
Have you ever tried the red vinegar sushi?

transcription.text: វាចទំរដែបណាង់រើគាង់ង្ញិដ឵ំតិចក្កាមជម្ឍៈទិកប្លុំ។ ញឭកបំរងអាចីធកីរាយម្រកគាចអាយ អាយត្កឰ Aun្ញាកាគត់ាំ។
